artifacts.summary:
# Research briefing (local worker)

## Request
Research the request raised in this live meeting: "What already exists in the market for local 1st meeting tools?". Additional context from the meeting: Please research existing meeting agents, Google Meet capture tools, and local transcription products. Produce a concise briefing: a short list of relevant prior art with one-line summaries, positioning notes, links, and key differentiators. Cite sources.

## Notes
- Produced by the deterministic local-research worker inside a sandboxed scratch.
- No network and no repo access: this proves the runn…
